message:
Add context package branch coverage tests

Cover previously untested branches in:
- GetAgentCapabilities: cursor, windsurf, aider, openai, google variants (85.7%→100%)
- MessageCountEstimator.Estimate: zero/negative TokensPerMessage (87.5%→100%)
- CumulativeTokenEstimator.Estimate: invalid discount values (88.9%→100%)
- DurationActivityEstimator.Estimate: zero session, short duration, activity levels (70%→95%)
- extractAgentIndex: no numeric parts case (87.5%→100%)

Overall context package: 62.5% → 62.9%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
